text:
There was an old man whose favorite song was *The Soundtrack to Life*. One day, as he listened intently to it one evening, he dreamt...

There was once a curious hedgehog who loved to collect tiny stones. One day, a shiny glitterstone glimmered just like his favorite songbird shiny feathers.

The hedgehog decided to collect it, promising himself that he would use it to decorate his cottage.

As the weeks went by, the hedgehog eagerly gathered stones. But near his favorite cave by the river, a shimmering stone shimmered just a little too faintly.

Deciding it resembled his favorite bird, he decided to dedicate it to her.

The next morning, the beautiful bird flew gracefully into the cave.

"Oh my goodness!" the hawk exclaimed.

"You brought them?"

"Why?"

"To decorate my favorite spot!"

The hawk laughed delightfully.

"Oh, little dear," she cooed. "Some things are too special to collect, even for a bird."
